reviews.review_description: Good performance, nothing original but... cheaper! however repeat 2 or more leves because you lost in 1 its no only annoying but tired. Do you like super hot? go on, probably you are going to love it! The best feature (in contrast) is darker backgrounds.

I have played some of the demo and have been very impressed so far. The game has a similar feel to Superhot VR game and really hope they release the full version soon but at a cheaper price than its competitor. A very promising shooting/combat game.
A copy of superhot with some interesting ideas on where they differ. Not bad - but still needs a lot of work and polish.
